message:
fix(algorithms): use edges_ordered() for deterministic arborescence partition iteration

- Replace direct arb_edges iteration with arb.edges_ordered() when
  generating child partitions in arborescence_iterator_ordered_with_partition,
  ensuring deterministic partition generation order regardless of
  internal HashMap iteration order in the arborescence graph
- Note: file contains duplicated trailing code from a concurrent agent
  session that will need cleanup in a follow-up

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
